rumor.detail: Handed place in matchday squad vs Aston Villa. Senior progression

newIntel.reasoning: New senior squad inclusion dated May 15, 2026, after latest existing rumor (May 11 bench). Confirms progression trajectory and competitive integration.

rumor.detail: OM relaunched pursuit, preparing to overbid Watford's ~€1M offer

newIntel.reasoning: Apr 1, 2026 report of OM counter-bid activity is within existing date range but represents escalation in competitive bidding. Watford deal had been reported at €1M by Mar 16; this shows Marseille re-entry with intent to outbid as of Apr 1.

needsReview.detail: Search returned Souleymane Faye (b.Feb 8, 2003, RW, Sporting CP as of Jan 2026). Database lists b.2010 player at Sahel F.C.
